case_title: SERGEI SEVERINOV VS. DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: PAUL MARINELLI) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEVERINOV, SERGEI AS TO DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2022 - JUDGMENT.
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY SHERIFF, 4095 LEMON ST.,
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**(DEFENDANT)
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7.37 ACCRUED INTEREST, $280.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO MAY-05-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERGEI SEVERINOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED STEVE BIRDWELL VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUESTS. FILING WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-30-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. VENUE IS ESTABLISHED PROPER. DUE TO DEFENDANT'S VENUE CHALLENGE, SERVICE IS DEEMED PROPER. PLAINTIFF SERGEI SEVERINOV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC. IS NOT PRESENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS).
ORDER TO ALLOW DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT TIMELY ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEVERINOV, SERGEI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC $479.70 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $544.70 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC HEARING SET FOR AUG-25-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) **NOTE THIS IS SERVICE REGARDING OEX ** (SEE NOTES) SERVED JUN-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2022 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF SERGEI SEVERINOV IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

DEFENDANT DESERT CHAMPIONS LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVE BIRDWELL, CHIEF OPERATING OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
